title: Origins: Troglodyte
description: A troglodyte based Origin for the Origins mod. Primitive and savage, troglodytes are reptilian humanoids who have always been creatures of instinct and brutality.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NI1YjcteBTc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod and requires Apugli. While Pehkui is not mandatory, it is highly recommended.**

[This Origin was suggested by **TheGreatWalmartBag** on Discord. If you would like to suggest your own data pack, you can do so over on my Discord server as well.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)

**Troglodyte:** Primitive and savage, troglodytes are reptilian humanoids who have always been creatures of instinct and brutality. They dwell in the lightless depths of the world, driven by hunger and a primal connection to their chaotic god, Laogzed. Troglodytes have no noble past, only an existence steeped in filth, violence, and survival.

**Impact:** 🔴🔴🔴

**🟩 Savage Strength [Primary]:** With sinews hardened by years of subterranean survival, you can grab and hurl others with feral might. Few can withstand your primal force.

**🟩 Burrowed Rest [Shift + Primary]:** Your subterranean instincts allow you to sleep anywhere, finding comfort in jagged stone or buried earth. You need no bed, as any sheltered spot feels as natural as home.

**🟩 Flesh and Fat [Secondary / Shift + Secondary]:** Your metabolism is monstrous. By focusing, you store excess nourishment in grotesque fat reserves. Focus and draw from these reserves to replenish yourself at the cost of stored energy.

**🟢 Claws of Ruin:** Your claws are brutal tools of destruction, as effective as iron implements. They can carve through stone, soil, and flesh with equal ease, serving as both weapons and tools.

**🟢 Corrupted Constitution:** Your savage biology grants you immunity to poison and hunger, letting you endure ailments that would destroy most surface-dwellers.

**🟢 Eyes of the Abyss:** Generations of darkness have honed your vision. Permanent night vision allows you to pierce even the deepest shadows, but bright light remains blinding.

**🟡 Child of Darkness:** You are a creature of the night. The sun’s warmth brings no comfort, and you instinctively seek rest during the day.

**🟡 Monstrous Form:** Your towering frame stands at an imposing height, a grotesque figure of power and terror. Few can meet your gaze without trembling.

**🟡 Repugnant Presence:** Your foul odor is your natural defense. Hostile mobs instinctively avoid you, but villagers find your presence intolerable, sending their Iron Golems to eliminate you on sight.

**🟡 Stonebound Scales:** Your hardened scales offer natural protection akin to armor but make swimming impossible. Water becomes an enemy, dragging you down due to your immense weight.

**🔴 Gluttonous Curse:** Your monstrous size demands a constant intake of sustenance. You grow hungry faster than ordinary beings, a cruel irony in the barren depths you call home.

**🔴 The Light’s Scorn:** Bright light is agony. Exposure cripples you, sapping your strength and agility. You belong to the shadows, and the sun’s wrath reminds you of this curse.


<details>
<summary>🗡️ Unique Weapon - Ossuary Maul 🗡️</summary>

**Crafting:**

![Row One: Netherite Ingot, Skeleton Skull, Netherite Ingot. Row Two: String, Bone, String. Row Three: String, Bone, String.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b12f20559691f11c527b60b3fa7fdf580c8dc063.png)

Note: If the recipe doesn't result in the sword and instead appears as red stained glass, do not craft it; You will not receive the weapon and your materials will be essentially deleted.

**Lore Entry:** 

A gruesome bludgeon formed from a weathered skull, plated in netherite, its eye sockets dark with the whispers of the dead. The handle is an abomination of bone, sinew, and spines; its grip bites into the wielder's flesh, demanding pain as tribute. With every unbroken strike, the weapon feeds on the momentum of death, growing heavier with the echoes of suffering.

**Special Ability:**
- Kill enemies to build up Ossuary Charges.
- Killing an enemy does not reset Ossuary Charges.
- The number of Ossuary Charges is added to attack damage.
- Ossuary Charges fade away over time.
- If the player takes any damage, they will receive the damage from the Ossuary Charges instead and the number of Charges will be set to zero.
- Fast combat and blocking are recommended for the best experience.

</details>

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
